title: Face Facts Collagen Q10 Facial Serum with Ubiquinone (Q10), Collagen and Betaine; Softens and smooths; Helps to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines; 30ml

features: Energise your skin with our Face Facts Collagen Q10 Facial Serum, it helps improve skin elasticity and smooth your skin
Hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant; Known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines
Really lightweight formula, making it easy to use pm or am (just remember your SPF on top for the day)
Boosted with Collagen, Glycerin Betaine; All help make your skin soft, smooth and lovely
AM or PM use before applying makeup in the morning for that natural radiance, or before bed for overnight restoration
description: Product Description Improve your skin's youthful elasticity and firmness with our Collagen Serum. Formulated with restoring Collagen and nourishing Amino Acids, it gets to work on the visible signs of ageing, gently hydrating and renewing the skin's surface while helping to smooth fine lines. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Butylene Glycol, Sorbeth-30, Betaine, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Panthenol, Glycosphingolipids, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Carbomer, Aminomethyl Propanol, Xanthan Gum, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Disodium EDTA, Fragrance (Parfum), Phosphatidylcholine, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Phytosphingosine, Cholesterol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. See more
